---
image: Images/mes_headshot.JPEG 
toc: false
body-classes: default-page
navbar:
  pinned: True
---

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](Images/mes_headshot.JPEG){fig-alt="Matthew Schoen Headshot" width="150%"}

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-1}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7 .text-panel-index style="display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:center;"}

[**Hi, I'm Matthew!**]{style="font-size:250%;"}

I’m a fourth-year Environmental Studies student at the University of California, Santa Barbara, graduating in June 2026, with a passion for turning sustainability strategy into measurable real-world impact. Through hands-on leadership and project management experience, I’ve worked across corporate sustainability operations and supply chain initiatives at Kohler Co., as well as community-driven environmental outreach, circular economy programs, and coalition building efforts. I enjoy collaborative, fast-paced environments and bring an energetic, people-oriented approach to the work I do.

Outside of sustainability, I’m always happy to talk track & field, cars, photography, or anything involving good design and big ideas!

:::

::::
